comment: Required in MigsBa only (flagged active: JGI isolate modeling exports to NCBI as MIGS-BA, #2803). not-covered: the count-of-replicons concept (chromosomes/segments per genome) is unmodeled in NMDC, and it is core genome metadata for isolates. Active-work upgrades this over its low historical weight.

Required in MigsBa only (active: JGI isolate work, #2803). not-covered as a class slot, but the slot is already defined (TextValue: a pmid/doi/url reference for isolation and growth conditions) and attached to no class. Low-effort fix: give the existing orphan a class home. Active-work upgrades it.

Required in MigsBa only (active: isolate work, #2803). not-covered: the similarly named native contigs slot is a contiguity score (sum of length*log(length)), not a contig count, so it is a different metric. NMDC assembly statistics live on workflow_execution (MetagenomeAssembly) records, where a count could be added.

Required in MigsBa only (active: isolate work, #2803). uncertain-mapping: no native assembly_software slot, but the assembling software and version are recorded as workflow-execution provenance (MetagenomeAssembly git_url and version). Different shape from a per-record MIxS field.

Required in MigsBa only (active: isolate work, #2803). uncertain-mapping: MIxS assembly_qual is a categorical tier (finished / high-quality draft / ...). Native asm_score is a numeric float; the MIMAG categorical quality is captured by MagBin.bin_quality (BinQualityEnum) but is MAG-scoped, not checklist/isolate-scoped. Confirm intended mapping with the team.

Required in Mims and MigsBa. firm-covered: NMDC records the sequencing machine via instrument_used (range Instrument, a controlled class) on NucleotideSequencing, a stronger structure than the MIxS free-text field. InstrumentModelEnum (41 values) covers DNA sequencers well: Illumina (novaseq/hiseq/miseq/nextseq), Oxford Nanopore (minion/gridion/promethion), PacBio (sequel/revio), alongside mass-spec models. A native seq_meth slot also exists but sits on no class (redundant orphan).

Required in both checklists and nearly every extension including Soil (weight 0.70) and Water (0.15). uncertain-mapping: no native project_name slot, but biosamples link to a Study via associated_studies and Study carries a name, and ncbi_project_name exists on NucleotideSequencing. Confirm whether the Study linkage satisfies the checklist requirement for NCBI/INSDC export or a per-record project name is still needed.
